items.title: Reusable model-call wrappers
items.description: Wrap raw API calls in small functions like generate(prompt, **opts), embed(text) and retrieve(query) so the rest of the app stays clean and the wrappers are easy to unit-test.

items.title: Tool / function calling
items.description: LLM tool calling exposes plain Python functions with typed parameters and docstrings; the model picks one and supplies arguments, and your code executes it and returns the result.

items.title: Streaming callbacks
items.description: Pass a callback function (or closure capturing request context) to a streaming client so each token/chunk is handled as it arrives without coupling the producer to the consumer.

items.title: Per-request configuration via closures
items.description: A factory like make_client(api_key, model) returns a configured call() closure, capturing settings once so callers don't repeat them on every invocation.

items.title: Pure helpers for testable pipelines
items.description: Keep prompt formatting, token counting and parsing as pure functions; isolate side effects (network, disk) so the pipeline's core logic is deterministic and unit-testable.
